aids.title: EDO-C: Morphological Operations
aids.content:
**E**rosion = **S**hrink (both have 'S' sound)
**D**ilation = **G**row (D comes before G)
**O**pening = E then D = removes **N**oise (O-N)
**C**losing = D then E = fills **H**oles (C-H)

aids.title: Filter Selection Guide
aids.content:
**Salt-and-pepper noise?** Use Median filter
**Gaussian noise?** Use Gaussian blur
**Preserve edges?** Use Bilateral filter
**Fast blur?** Use Box filter

aids.title: Kernel as a Magnifying Glass
aids.content: Imagine the kernel as a magnifying glass that moves across the image. At each position, it looks at a small neighborhood, computes a weighted average (the lens focuses differently on different parts), and writes the result to the output image.

aids.title: Opening vs Closing
aids.content:
Opening removes noise that's white and small,
Closing fills holes, that is all.
Open = Erode then Dilate (noise goes away),
Close = Dilate then Erode (holes don't stay).
